briefdescription.para: An error occurred in the hipDNN backend.
A required attribute was not set.
Error codes returned by hipDNN Frontend operations.

detaileddescription.para: Determines how the convolution filter is applied to the input tensor.

briefdescription.para: Compare greater or equal: x >= y.
Compare less or equal: x <= y.
Specifies the type of element-wise (pointwise) operation.

detaileddescription.para: Pointwise operations are applied element-by-element to tensors. They can be unary (1 input), binary (2 inputs), or ternary (3 inputs).

briefdescription.para: Specifies the data type for tensor elements.

detaileddescription.para: Defines the numeric precision and format for tensor data. Different operations may support different subsets of data types.

briefdescription.para: Use fallback heuristics for engine selection.
Specifies the heuristic mode for engine selection.

detaileddescription.para: Controls how the hipDNN backend selects execution plans and engines.

briefdescription.para: Use heuristics to select the best plan.
Specifies how execution plans are selected during graph building.
Specifies the data type of a knob value.

detaileddescription.para: Knobs are configuration parameters for engine execution. This enum indicates what type of value a particular knob expects.

memberdef.definition: using hipdnn_frontend::KnobValueVariant = typedef std::variant<int64_t, double, std::string>
memberdef.name: KnobValueVariant

briefdescription.para: Variant type for knob values (integer, float, or string)
Get the DataType enum value corresponding to a C++ type.

parameterdescription.para: The C++ type (float, half, hip_bfloat16, double, etc.)

briefdescription.para: Check if a pointwise mode is a unary operation (1 input)

simplesect.para: true if the mode is unary, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Check if a pointwise mode is a binary operation (2 inputs)

simplesect.para: true if the mode is binary, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Check if a pointwise mode is a ternary operation (3 inputs)

simplesect.para: true if the mode is ternary, false otherwise
